name: sms-video-editor
description: SMS AI-Powered Video Editor - Fully Automated & Containerized

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.deploy:ghpages: npm run build:frontend && echo 'Frontend build ready for GitHub Pages at ./frontend/dist'
scripts.clean: docker-compose down -v && rm -rf backend/data backend/temp frontend/dist
